name: Dudu Bites Dog Biscuit 500g (200pcs)
shortDescription: Treat your dog to the wholesome goodness of Dudu Bites! These dry biscuit treats are not only perfect for rewarding your pup but also make a delicious topper for their regular meals. Crafted with all-natural ingredients and no additives, Dudu Bites are a guilt-free snack you should feel good about. 14 Week Shelf- life.
description: Dudu Bites: Nourishing Treats for Your Furry Friend Treat your dog to the wholesome goodness of Dudu Bites! These dry biscuit treats are not only perfect for rewarding your pup but also make a delicious topper for their regular meals. Crafted with all-natural ingredients and no additives, Dudu Bites are a guilt-free snack you can feel good about. Katango Dudu Bites dog biscuits offer homemade goodness, crafted with care for your furry friend. These treats are both delightful and nutritious, approved by a licensed canine nutritionist. Free from strange preservatives, artificial flavors, or colors, and without any artificial fillers, they contain only all-natural ingredients made with love by a dedicated dog enthusiast. Key Features: Protein-Packed : With 27% protein, these treats provide the essential nutrients your dog needs to thrive. Healthy Fats : At 8% fat, Dudu Bites support healthy skin and a shiny coat. Rich in Fiber : 7% fiber aids digestion, ensuring your dog stays happy and healthy. Grain-Free Goodness : Perfect for pups with dietary sensitivities. Wholefood Ingredients: Each bite is made with a careful blend of nutrient-rich ingredients, including: Black Soldier Fly Larvae : A sustainable source of insect protein. Zucchini, Carrots, Potatoes, and Sweet Potatoes : Packed with vitamins and minerals. Spinach and Parsley : Loaded with antioxidants for overall health. Apples and Bananas : Naturally sweet and full of fiber. Eggs : A complete protein source. Beef Liver : Rich in essential nutrients. Flaxseeds : A great source of omega-3 fatty acids. Rosemary : Natural preservative with antioxidant properties. Give your dog a tasty treat that’s both delicious and nutritious. Dudu Bites are the perfect way to show your furry friend just how much you care!
